action_text: Click the "All" menu to open the left navigation panel
rationale: We need to open the application navigator to reach Reports > View/Run.
The page content is still loading; a short wait can ensure UI elements are ready before interacting.

action_text: Click the global search field in the header
rationale: If the left nav is slow, using the global search can help locate the Reports area quickly.

action_text: Type "Reports View/Run" into the global search field
rationale: Search for the Reports View/Run module using the global search as an alternative path.

action_text: Press Enter in the global search field to run the search
rationale: Execute the global search to navigate to or find the Reports View/Run module.
